note: Tier audit (Bossing A). Acid Ammo: 'upon reloading to max, the first round deals sustained damage 192%/s for 30s' — re-applied every reload (~5s cadence) so effectively permanent; the parser's one-shot 30s passive dot died at t=30 -> duration extended to whole fight. Burst forced-reload economy unsupported (warned). S1 normalAttack +30 passive, burst-cast team True Damage 34.99 parse fine. PROBE CALIBRATION ⚑ (run I, 2.09 hot): acid dot joins the U1 exempt class (noFb; rider range exemption universal). Residual heat flagged if it persists. CADENCE FIX (2026-07-13, test battery 2 test 4, jill focus video): her datamined rate_of_fire is 150 rpm = 2.5 shots/sec (magnum), NOT the assault-rifle class default ~740 rpm - the video's ammo counter drops one round per ~0.4-0.5s. Her per-hit popup values matched the sim at 99.7% across all four classes (body 180,633 / core hit 319,582 / crit 250,107 / acid tick 288,662), so the entire 1.67 heat was cadence. charFixes.pullsPerSec 2.5. RELOAD: she pays her normal synced reload (reloadFrames 81 -> 92f effective; no charFixes reload override) — she is a single-chunk reloader (datamine reload_bullet 10000) with no rolling or partial-reload mechanic. Her burst's 'Removes 100% of ammo. Forced Reload.' IS modeled: consumeAmmo fraction 1 on the burstCast block dumps the magazine and forces an immediate reload every cast, exactly as the kit states, whether or not she was already full. The paired 'Reload speed is fixed at a 99.96% increase for 10 sec' is a stat LOCK (owner ruling 2026-07-22: 'is fixed at' clamps the stat at that level — it does NOT grant +99.96% speed), pinning her reload at ~normal speed and blocking reload-speed support for 10s; the engine has no clamp vocabulary, so it stays unmodeled and is inert in any comp without reload-speed support (open-questions U31). The forced reload's kit PURPOSE — re-triggering Magnum Ammo and Acid Ammo, which both key on 'upon reloading to Max Ammunition' — is already carried by modeling those two as permanent, so this block adds the COST without double-counting the benefit. Her 192%/s acid (sustained, permanent) takes the +50% FB major by landing timing — only Modernia's Paradise Lost is type-exempt. noRange KEPT (universal). Her per-hit values are VIDEO-CONFIRMED at 99.7% incl. the acid tick (288,662) and the heat was already cadence (pullsPerSec 2.5) -- so applying FB to her (correctly-valued) in-FB acid ticks is the faithful result: she now grades ~1.07-1.34, hottest in high-FB / elem-advantage comps (T2 elec-weak) where acid spends more ticks inside FB. Since per-hit values check out, the residual is FB-uptime, not a coefficient. OPEN: confirm her acid tick jumps x1.5 inside FB from the battery-2-test-4 focus video (the 288,662 read was ambiguous on FB-state); do NOT re-fudge.
